notes: Created Blender scene setup for nucleus production work.
Added shared organic material helper functions inside build_nucleus.py.
Created exact manifest objects for WholeCell_ContextSocket and Nucleus_RootRig only.
Added camera and lighting suitable for later organic, layered nucleus review renders.
Full organelle components were intentionally not built in Phase 1.

visual_organic_quality.notes: Phase 1 contains no organelle mesh; material recipes include procedural bump, color variation, transparency, and emission for later organic finishing.

biology_accuracy.notes: No biological structure beyond rig and context socket was modeled, avoiding false single-membrane or pore claims.

animation_functionality.notes: Nucleus_RootRig is the parent transform for later animation-ready component groups.

roblox_export_readiness.notes: Scene uses named objects and collections; later mesh phases must keep modifiers applied or export-safe.

whole_cell_integration.notes: WholeCell_ContextSocket provides the future alignment point for the whole-cell assembly.

roblox_export_risks: Procedural Blender material nodes will need baking or Roblox material approximation before import.
Future transparency and emission settings should be simplified for Roblox performance.
Future biological mesh density must be watched carefully so rounded detail stays mobile-friendly.
next_recommended_phase: Phase 2: block in the double nuclear envelope as separate outer membrane, inner membrane, and glowing perinuclear lumen segment groups without adding pores yet.
